data.title: American Hotel Income Properties REIT LP to Host Fourth Quarter 2025 Results Conference Call on March 31, 2026
data.description: American Hotel Income Properties REIT LP, known as AHIP, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, revealed plans to disclose its financial report for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The results are set to be publicized after the market closes on Monday, March 30, 2026. Those interested can engage in the conference call for AHIP's Q4 2025 outcomes scheduled for Tuesday, March 31, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time. Executives of the Company will delve into AHIP’s financial standing during the call. AHIP is listed as HOT.UN, HOT.U, HOT.DB.V on the Toronto Stock Exchange.

data.title: University of Phoenix Celebrates Working Adult Learners at 2026 Spring Commencement
data.description: University of Phoenix recently held its 2026 Spring commencement ceremony in Phoenix, emphasizing its commitment to providing career-focused education, accommodating learning options, and assistance to first-generation students. The event recognized working adult learners, showcasing the university's dedication to supporting diverse educational pathways. This celebration underscored the institution's mission to offer accessible education, with a focus on practical skills and professional development, for the graduating class of approximately [number] students.

data.title: Bitcoin traders predict 53% chance of BTC below $66K by April 24. Price dropped due to US economy and Iran war fears.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin experienced a significant decline on Friday due to uncertainty surrounding the US economy and the ongoing conflict in Iran. This led to negative impacts on both stock and cryptocurrency markets. The exact numbers for the decrease in the price of Bitcoin were not provided.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Repurchase of own shares on 27.03.2026
data.description: On March 27, 2026, Nordea Bank Abp announced changes in its own shares with a stock exchange release. The company (LEI: 529900ODI3047E2LIV03) completed repurchases of its own shares (ISIN: FI4000297767) on the same day at 22:30 EET. The specific details of the repurchases were not mentioned in the news release.

data.title: Magna Posts 2025 Annual Report
data.description: A company based in Aurora, Ontario, Magna International Inc. (TSX: MG; NYSE: MGA), has made its 2025 Annual Report public today. This disclosure includes key documents such as Management’s Discussion and Analysis, Audited Consolidated Financial Statements, Annual Information Form (AIF), and Form 40-F. Interested parties can access these reports on Magna's official website, www.magna.com. Furthermore, the company has submitted these materials to the Canadian Securities Administrators (available at www.sedarplus.ca ) and the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (accessible through www.sec.gov/edgar ).

data.title: Electra Restarts Construction and Reports 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Today, Electra Battery Materials Corporation (NASDAQ: ELBM; TSX-V: ELBM) announced its 2025 financial results in Toronto. The Company showcased a prosperous recapitalization and recommencement of construction for its cobalt sulfate refinery.

data.title: GAO Report Strengthens Case for Congressional Action on CMMI
data.description: Recent findings from the Government Accountability Office revealed alarming statistics about the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Innovation (CMMI), a program introduced in the Affordable Care Act in 2010. The report, corroborating concerns raised by the Citizens Against Government Waste (CCAGW), highlighted significant financial mismanagement by CMMI, leading to the wastage of taxpayer funds. This study serves as a stark reminder of the ongoing challenges associated with CMMI's implementation and underscores the need for increased oversight and accountability in managing public resources.

data.title: UWMC Responds to Two Harbors Acquisition Deal
data.description: In Pontiac, Michigan, UWMC recently released a statement about its bid to acquire TWO. UWMC expressed dissatisfaction with TWO’s management and board, claiming their decisions do not prioritize shareholder interests. They criticized the team for previously settling a $375 million lawsuit and believe ego is driving TWO’s current actions rather than sound judgment. UWMC emphasized their interest in acquiring TWO’s servicing book, not their operations, highlighting a strategic move.

data.title: Shrub Oak International School Announces Janine D'Anna, M.S. Ed., as Assistant Director of Education
data.description: In Mohegan Lake, New York, on March 27, 2026, Shrub Oak International School shared exciting news about Janine D'Anna, M.S. Ed., joining as the new Assistant Director of Education. Ms. D'Anna, a respected member within the Shrub Oak community, brings her experience from various leadership roles. This appointment showcases a commitment to enhancing the educational standards at the school.

data.title: NextPlat Announces Reverse Stock Split to Regain Compliance with Nasdaq's Bid Price Requirement
data.description: On March 27, 2026, NextPlat Corp (NASDAQ: NXPL, NXPLW), headquartered in Hallandale Beach, Florida, revealed their latest update. The company, known for its diverse consumer products and services, focuses on healthcare and technology solutions distributed through e-commerce and retail platforms on a global scale.

data.title: Foundation for the Development of Western Syria Warns of Dangerous Escalation Targeting the Christian Community in Syria and Threatening Civil Peace
data.description: The Foundation for the Development of Western Syria strongly condemns a recent series of extremist attacks and coordinated movements in multiple Syrian provinces. These incidents pose a significant threat to Syria's social cohesion and particularly endanger the indigenous Christian population. Among these attacks was one on the city of Al-Suqaylabiyah, where a coordinated assault was carried out. The severity of the situation is underscored by the number of casualties reported and the widespread impact on local communities. The Foundation is deeply concerned about the escalation of violence in the region and the targeting of vulnerable populations.

data.title: Drive A Tesla To Work Here? This Auto Giant Will Ticket Its Own Employees
data.description: Stellantis NV, a prominent automotive corporation, is emphasizing the significance of brand loyalty among its employees. Despite offering a range of brands like Jeep, Ram, Dodge, and Chrysler for employees to choose from for commuting, some are opting for vehicles from rival companies. Consequently, these non-Stellantis vehicle owners may find themselves parked in distant lots at the Stellantis North American headquarters in Michigan. Earlier this year, the company mandated a return to the office five days a week, leading to repercussions for employees with vehicles from brands like Tesla, Ford, or General Motors who are now receiving parking citations. Only employees with a Stellantis brand vehicle are entitled to park in the closest lots to the building. This underscores the company's stance on brand loyalty and its impact on employees.

data.title: How Expert Aesthetician Kate Bryan of Milton Explains Seasonal Skincare Routine for HelloNation
data.description: In Milton, Florida on March 27, 2026, a recent article from HelloNation discusses the importance of adapting skincare routines according to the seasons. Kate Bryan from 82 Magnolia Aesthetics & Wellness provides valuable insights in the article. Understanding how the skin reacts to changes in weather is crucial, and the piece emphasizes the significance of adjusting skincare regimens accordingly.

data.title: Global Premiere of Award-winning Documentary: "UNBROKEN: The Untold Story of Shen Yun"
data.description: On March 27, 2026 in New York, during Shen Yun's ongoing 2026 world tour, several performers took a break from their shows to attend the premiere of "Unbroken: The Untold Story of Shen Yun." This special event brought together the artists with filmmakers and VIP guests on the red carpet. This unique stop showcased the talents of the performers beyond their stage routines, creating a memorable experience for the attendees.
